text: I feel a sense of curiosity mixed with introspection as I stand in this modern, thoughtfully designed space. The glass walls and bright lighting evoke transparency and a desire to understand what lies within. Entering the 'R+D' area, I am drawn to the interplay between technology and humanity. The explanations on the wall invite me to reflect on our relationship with intelligent machines and how research shapes our coexistence. I feel inspired to ponder progress, boundaries, and the unknown—the timeless questions of human experience in the face of rapid innovation.
